title: DonutShop
description: A comprehensive, feature-rich shop system for your Minecraft server
body:
# DonutShop

## ✨ Features

- **Multiple Shop Categories** – End, Nether, Gear, and Food shops with unique items
- **Economy Integration** – Seamless Vault integration for all transactions
- **Interactive GUI** – Beautiful unicode-styled shop interfaces
- **Fully Customizable** – Configure prices, messages, and sounds to your liking
- **Quantity Selection** – Players can adjust purchase amounts before buying
- **Sound Effects** – Audio feedback for successful and failed purchases
- **Hex Color Support** – Modern color codes for vibrant messages

## Commands & Permissions

| Command     | Description              | Permission     | Default       |
|-------------|--------------------------|----------------|---------------|
| `/shop`    | Opens the main shop GUI | `donutshop.use` | All Players  |
| `/donutshop` | Alias for `/shop`     | `donutshop.use` | All Players  |

## ⚙️ Requirements

| Component          | Version                  |
|--------------------|--------------------------|
| **Minecraft**     | 1.17+ (Full functionality) |
| **Java**          | 8 or higher             |
| **Spigot/Paper**  | 1.13+ to 1.21+          |
| **Vault**         | Latest version          |
| **Economy Plugin**| EssentialsX, CMI, or similar |

> **⚠️ Note:** Servers running 1.13-1.16 may experience limited functionality due to missing materials from newer versions.

## ⚙️ Configuration

### Color Codes Reference
Use the `&` prefix for color codes in messages:

```
&0 Black &1 Dark Blue &2 Dark Green &3 Dark Aqua
&4 Dark Red &5 Dark Purple &6 Gold &7 Gray
&8 Dark Gray &9 Blue &a Green &b Aqua
&c Red &d Light Purple &e Yellow &f White
&l Bold &m Strikethrough &n Underline &o Italic
```

### Example Configuration (config.yml):

```yaml
# GUI Titles
gui:
  main-shop-title: "ѕʜᴏᴘ"
  end-shop-title: "ѕʜᴏᴘ - ᴇɴᴅ"
  nether-shop-title: "ѕʜᴏᴘ - ɴᴇᴛʜᴇʀ"
  gear-shop-title: "ѕʜᴏᴘ - ɢᴇᴀʀ"
  food-shop-title: "ѕʜᴏᴘ - ꜰᴏᴏᴅ"
# Messages
messages:
  not-enough-money: "&cYou don't have enough money."
  inventory-full: "&cYour inventory is full."
# Sounds
sounds:
  purchase-successful: "ENTITY_EXPERIENCE_ORB_PICKUP"
  purchase-successful-volume: 0.5
  purchase-unsuccessful: "ENTITY_VILLAGER_NO"
  click: "UI_BUTTON_CLICK"
# Sample Prices
prices:
  enderchest: 2500
  blazerod: 150
  totemofundying: 1250
  steak: 35
```

## Shop Categories

**End Shop:** Ender Chest • Ender Pearls • End Stone • Dragon Breath • Chorus Fruit • Shulker Shells

**Nether Shop:** Blaze Rods • Nether Wart • Glowstone Dust • Magma Cream • Ghast Tears • Quartz

**⚔️ Gear Shop:** Obsidian • End Crystals • Respawn Anchors • Totems of Undying • Golden Apples • Arrows

**Food Shop:** Potatoes • Sweet Berries • Carrots • Apples • Cooked Chicken • Steak • Golden Carrots

## Installation

1. Download **DonutShop.jar**
2. Place it in your server’s **plugins** folder
3. Install **Vault** and an economy plugin
4. Restart your server
5. Customize **config.yml** to your preferences
6. Reload or restart to apply changes

## Version Info

**Current Version:** 1.8  
**API Version:** 1.13+  
**Author:** GamingHuzai

## Support

If you encounter issues, please ensure:

- You have the correct Minecraft version
- Vault and an economy plugin are installed
- Your configuration file uses valid YAML syntax
- All dependencies are up to date
